site.name: TUUCAN
site.fullName: Tennessee Unitarian Universalist Community Action Network

announcement.text: TUUCAN is co-sponsoring the Tennessee Solidarity Summit — Sept 18–20, Memphis

hero.eyebrow: Tennessee Unitarian Universalist Community Action Network
hero.heading: Working Together for Justice Across Tennessee
hero.subheading: We are a statewide community of Unitarian Universalists living and amplifying our shared values — justice, equity, transformation, pluralism, interdependence, and generosity — with love always at the center.

event.title: Tennessee Solidarity Summit
event.location: Neshoba Unitarian Universalist Church, Cordova (Memphis) Tennessee
body: TUUCAN is proud to co-sponsor the Tennessee Solidarity Summit, hosted by UU the Vote. Join us for a weekend of learning, training, and relationship-building to grow our collective power for justice across Tennessee.

Multiple working groups are required to make the Solidarity Summit a success. These include: Communications and Promotion, Logistics and Safety, Programming, and Volunteer Recruitment and Training. Weekly planning meetings are scheduled between now and September 18. Volunteers are welcome.

We are seeking representation from each of the 14 Tennessee Unitarian Universalist churches, congregations, and fellowships. Group transportation (by bus) is being planned from Knoxville and Nashville. We are expecting up to 100 attendees - you are invited to join us as we live and amplify our shared values of justice, equity, transformation, plurality, interdependence, and generosity, with love at the center.

about.heading: Who We Are
body: TUUCAN brings together Unitarian Universalist congregations from across Tennessee to face the issues that affect our whole state. By pooling our resources and supporting one another, we turn shared values into collective action — from the statehouse to communities recovering from disaster.

Formed in 2025 after two years of grassroots organizing, TUUCAN now connects UUs in congregations spanning Tennessee. Together we advocate for justice, respond to crises, share what we learn, and build a stronger statewide community of faith in action.

items.title: Legislative Advocacy
items.body: We show up at the Tennessee statehouse and in our communities, advocating for justice, equity, and the dignity of every person.

items.title: Disaster Response
items.body: When crises and natural disasters strike, our congregations coordinate to help neighbors across the state recover.

items.title: Resource Sharing
items.body: We pool knowledge, tools, and people — so no congregation has to do justice work alone.

items.title: Community Building
items.body: Through monthly gatherings and our annual Fall Flock, we strengthen the ties that connect Tennessee UUs.

getInvolved.heading: Get Involved
getInvolved.body: Whether you belong to a Tennessee UU congregation or simply feel called to justice work, there is a place for you in TUUCAN. Reach out to learn how to connect with the network.
getInvolved.note: We gather on the third Saturday of each month at 10 AM via Zoom, and in person each fall for our statewide Flock.

footer.tagline: Tennessee Unitarian Universalist Community Action Network
